nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines C++ coding style conventions for the ECC harness, covering Modern C++ (C++17/20/23) features, RAII-based resource management, naming conventions, and formatting rules with reference pointers.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Documents C++ build hook integrations for the ECC harness, specifying pre-build and post-build hooks for compilation, linting, and a recommended CI pipeline configuration.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents idiomatic C++ design patterns recommended within the ECC harness, including RAII, the Rule of Five/Zero, value semantics, and structured error handling strategies.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Defines C++ security guidelines for the ECC harness covering memory safety, buffer overflow prevention, undefined behavior avoidance, and static analysis tooling recommendations.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Specifies C++ testing requirements for the ECC harness, covering the test framework choice, test execution, coverage measurement, and sanitizer usage (AddressSanitizer, UBSan).
